title: Uranium fuel
description: This mod introduces a new ore, uranium. Uranium is used as fuel with twice efficiency as regular coal.
body:
## Introduction

This mod introduces a new ore, uranium. Uranium is used as fuel with twice efficiency as regular coal. 

The mod is quite basic despite being useful, but i will try to update it and add more features, specially if people like it. You can also suggest changes or balance to the mod. 


It supports english and spanish.

 
## Obtaining uranium

Uranium ore can be found between height 25 and 40 with more probability at low levels. At least iron pickaxe is required to get uranium.

  ![Uranium ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dafd032cb36a954144836a32dee5a71675093d9e.png)

## Using uranium

The uranium is introduced into the furnace in the same way as it is done with coal.

 ![Using uranium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfd288eeb1d07f42d5677065a3b4da27a7f367ce.png)


Also, with 9 uranium (a filled craft table) you can make a uranium block, with decorative use.

 ![Uranium block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a76513d19f946833f7f7ec18055548cc37c42cd.png)
